events.why: Temple festival procession (festival) near Central Street Junction coincides with a known hotspot at BTP040 - Elite Junction; procession and devotee parking block the carriageway.
events.action: Pre-position a patrol unit and tow vehicle the evening before; mark no-parking on approaches and brief the morning shift.
